query:
UPDATE scrapingLogs 
SET status = 'failed', 
    errorMessage = 'Process terminated or timeout (automatically cleaned up)', 
    finishedAt = NOW() 
WHERE status = 'running' 
  AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, startedAt, NOW()) > 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3uDLYjDbp6rUVuo.05399e1d7c2a --database NY6jPB2PH8byUzFWqjpfhf --execute UPDATE scrapingLogs 
SET status = 'failed', 
    errorMessage = 'Process terminated or timeout (automatically cleaned up)', 
    finishedAt = NOW() 
WHERE status = 'running' 
  AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, startedAt, NOW()) > 10;
